# PRD: Example Product

## Status
Draft

## Product Goal

Describe the problem, target users, scope, and measurable success.

## Users

- Developer
- Reviewer
- Operator

## In Scope

- Feature behavior
- Acceptance criteria
- Quality gate expectations

## Out of Scope

- Private customer-specific workflows
- Private infrastructure details

## User Stories

### Story 1

As a user, I want a clear workflow so that I can validate the result before release.

## Acceptance Criteria

- The behavior is described in BDD.
- The implementation has TDD evidence.
- The change is linked in traceability.
